body.u: When I was sixteen I left school with five O levels 2 cses and went to collagecollege for four years to study engineering I was taught well at school and at collagecollege I didn’t like much offof my school years a lot of the time was wasted on pointless things, most of the teachers were fareleyfairly good there were a few bad teachers. My best time was at collagecollege I enjoyed studies and when I was seventeen I got a car as I had to travel twenty miles to get to the collagecollege. Getting a car was the thing I most looked forward to. I left collagecollege at twenty and had been trained as engineer there were plenty of jobs going, well paid, good holidays, not hard hours. I didn’t really want a settled job like taxi driver, police or army to get more experience from life by now I had {illegible} my car and got a motorbike.

I got a job as a delivery man which was well paid and then a salesman they were well paid jobs but had no future so when I was twenty five I sold my bike and got a good car and got a job working for aan engineering firm, weekends off in twelve weeks a years holiday, eleven thousand a year starting and retire a fifty five, retiring early is a good idea because jobs will be left for younger people.
